# ZYROO Studio

> Web design studio based in Faridabad, India. Builds landing pages, business
> websites, e-commerce stores, and hospital/clinic websites for small
> businesses, startups, and healthcare providers. 47+ projects delivered,
> 3–10 day turnaround, fixed pricing from ₹5,000.

## Services
- [Landing Page Design](https://tinytoono.in/order/landing-page): ₹5,000, 3 days
- [Portfolio Website](https://tinytoono.in/order/portfolio-website): ₹20,000, 4 days
- [Small Business Website](https://tinytoono.in/order/small-business): ₹40,000, 5 days
- [Business Website](https://tinytoono.in/order/business-website): ₹50,000, 7 days
- [E-Commerce Store](https://tinytoono.in/order/ecommerce-store): ₹60,000, 10 days
- [Website Redesign](https://tinytoono.in/order/website-redesign): ₹10,000, 4 days
- [3D Web Design](https://tinytoono.in/order/3d-web-design): ₹30,000, 5 days
- [Hospital Website](https://tinytoono.in/order/hospital-website): ₹50,000, 8 days
- [Clinic Website](https://tinytoono.in/order/clinic-website): ₹20,000, 4 days
